title: Mourir d'aimer...
overview: A love story between a teacher, Danièle, 32 years and one of her students Gérard, 17 during the heated atmosphere of May 68. Danièle is a fiery young woman, very involved politically. Gérard's parents accuse Danièle of statutory rape and complain. Danièle is trapped and the drama begins...

trailers.title: Mourir d'aimer (1971) | la bande-annonce
trailers.channel_name: TOUTMONCINÉMA | LE CINÉMA VU PAR VOUS, POUR VOUS !
